data.description: Citigroup has reduced its target price for Sanofi from €85 to €80.

data.title: The Royal Ballet School in LONDON offers free workshops to 160 Dagenham primary school students, Years 3, 4, and 5.
data.description: On the 14th of February, The Royal Ballet School organized a series of complimentary workshops for students from nearby schools in Dagenham. Approximately 160 students in Years 3, 4, and 5 participated in these insight workshops aimed at familiarizing them with the School’s national Associate Programme. The workshops were conducted by Victoria Collinson, the Head of Associates and Primary Steps Programmes at The Royal Ballet School, with assistance from Emily Gibbs. The event provided local school children the opportunity to engage with the School’s offerings and potentially explore further involvement in the Associate Programme.

data.title: Startup Parsec closes due to crypto market turbulence. Started in Jan 2021, amid Bitcoin surge, before hitting new highs.
data.description: In January 2021, Parsec was introduced to the market. Shortly after its launch, the price of Bitcoin nearly doubled, and later in the same year, it surged to new record levels.
The Philippines Foreign Ministry stated that while it is deepening relationships with like-minded nations, it continues to keep open lines with China for constructive dialogue.
Philippines Foreign Ministry says official statements on foreign policy should be considered in full and proper context.
The Philippines Foreign Ministry stated it will continue championing the nation’s maritime rights and interests through effective and principled diplomatic efforts.

data.title: Apollo invests $1 billion in Aldar, marking its fifth investment in the company and the region's largest corporate hybrid private placement.
data.description: Apollo has made its fifth investment in Aldar and the region's largest corporate hybrid private placement. This transaction solidifies Apollo's commitment to the region, with significant investment in Aldar's future growth.

data.title: Ekspress Grupp's revenue increased in Q4 and 12 months of 2025 due to investments in various businesses, with digital subscriptions rising notably.
data.description: In the fourth quarter and throughout the year, Ekspress Grupp saw an increase in revenue due to the company's focus on expanding its conference business, ticket sales, and digital outdoor screens. Furthermore, there was a significant growth in digital subscriptions of media companies owned by the group.

data.title: FDA accepts Roche’s giredestrant NDA for ESR1-mutated breast cancer. FDA decision expected by Dec 18, 2026. Giredestrant + everolimus could be first oral SERD combo in this setting.
data.description: Basel, 20 February 2026 - Roche announced today that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has accepted the company’s New Drug Application for giredestrant, an investigational oral therapy, in combination with everolimus for treating adult patients with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer post recurrence or progression on a previous endocrine-based regimen. The FDA is expected to decide on the approval by 18 December 2026. Giredestrant plus everolimus could become the first oral SERD combination approved in the post-CDK4/6 inhibitor setting.

data.title: Prosafe SE appoints Halvdan Kielland as permanent CFO on February 20, 2026 in Oslo.
data.description: Oslo, February 20, 2026 - Halvdan Kielland has been named as the new permanent Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Prosafe SE, a leading company based in Oslo. This appointment is a significant move for the company as it aims to strengthen its financial leadership.

data.title: Sumitomo Fudosan Villa Fontaine Co., Ltd introduces all-inclusive luxury stay at Villa Fontaine Premier Haneda Airport,Tokyo.
data.description: In Tokyo on February 20, 2026, Sumitomo Fudosan Villa Fontaine Co., Ltd., part of the Sumitomo Realty & Development Group, announced the launch of a comprehensive stay package at Villa Fontaine Premier Haneda Airport, conveniently linked to Haneda Airport Terminal 3. This new offering is set to begin in April.
